message:
fix(codex): wait for idle before draining queued nudges

Give the Codex preset a prompt prefix for tmux idle detection, make
busy-indicator checks generic (not Claude-specific), and skip nudge
drain cycles while prompt-aware agents are still busy.

Closes PR #2974

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
